name: Thyranoss
description: Titre-seisme serpentine dont le corps blindé de basalte perce la roche pure. Il détecte les vibrations à plusieurs kilomètres et surgit sous les cibles avec une précision chirurgicale.
prompt: Dark sci-fi fantasy, epic scale. A massive serpentine underground worm creature breaching the surface, its body armored with dark basalt plates and obsidian spines. Glowing magma veins run along its segmented body. A ring of pupilless yellow eyes surrounds its drilling head. Dust and rock debris erupt around it. Desert wasteland background, dramatic lighting, highly detailed.
